body: It was the Final. There is no second chance, no qualifier safety net — ${winner.name} have the trophy, ${loser.name} have the long winter to study what one extra partnership or one tighter over might have done.
Qualifier 1 done. ${winner.name} go straight through to the Final and get four days to recover; ${loser.name} drop to Qualifier 2, where the survival math gets cruel quickly.
Qualifier 2 settled. ${winner.name} book the second berth in the Final; ${loser.name}'s season ends here, with all the obvious lessons and a few less-obvious ones for the offseason notebook.

The Eliminator delivered the night's most efficient cruelty. ${winner.name} march into Qualifier 2 with their season still alive; ${loser.name} are out, the campaign ended at the first knock-out hurdle.
Playoff cricket has its own gravity. ${winner.name} survive the round and turn their attention to the next; ${loser.name} are left to weigh what carries forward and what does not.
